props.name: lineCount
props.description: Used within components that contain multiple lines. Currently only used in card skeleton type.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Sets the maximum width. Currently only used in card skeleton type.

props.name: size
props.description: Size can affect either the height, width or both for different skeleton types.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: type
props.description: Sets the skeleton shape to represent your content.
